paper_title: Signature-based identification of volatility models from path geometry
human_review_reasons: architecture_plan.json flags a High-severity risk: rough Bergomi simulation uses a Cholesky fBM substitute for the paper GPU hybrid scheme
A real bug was found and fixed during testing: passing objective/num_class explicitly to XGBClassifier caused .predict() to return probabilities instead of labels in xgboost 3.3.0
A second bug was found and fixed: 6.8_low_nu / 6.8_high_nu experiments were not applying the heston_ou_shared_dist kappa/theta sharing before nu override, silently ignoring the override

Open, unresolved item: 6.8_low_nu does not currently reproduce the papers direction (expected higher Heston/OU confusion at low nu; observed lower). Flagged honestly in README and notebook rather than presented as fixed.

Stage 6 comparison (2026-07-13): reproducibility score 0.38 (low confidence). New finding: OU per-class accuracy collapsed to 53.75% vs papers 100% at demo scale, disproportionate to other classes -- flagged for a larger-scale rerun to confirm sample-size hypothesis.

retry_history.reason: XGBClassifier objective/num_class bug found via unit test failure
6.8 nu-override elif-chain bug found via notebook execution (wrong direction result)
6.8_low_nu magnitude/direction still does not match paper after fix; root cause identified as an unresolved SIR ambiguity (comparable-ranges calibration), not a code bug
